mapper.insert: /* DocRcvMapper.insertDocRcvStatusInitial */ INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP ( DOC_RCV_ID , DOC_SEQ , RCV_YN , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) VALUES ( #{docRcvId} , 1 , 'N' , 'N' , SYSDATE , #{userId} , SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /* DocRcvMapper.insertDocRcvItem */ INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM@DL_MCP ( ITEM_SEQ , DOC_RCV_ID , ITEM_ID , STATUS , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT SQ_DOC_RCV_ITEM.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP , RCV.DOC_RCV_ID , ITEM.ITEM_ID , 'P' , #{userId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV@DL_MCP RCV , NMCP_WORK_TMPL_ITEM@DL_MCP ITEM WHERE RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND RCV.WORK_TMPL_ID = ITEM.WORK_TMPL_ID
mapper.select: /* DocRcvMapper.getDocRcvDetail */ WITH DOC_RCV_STATUS AS ( SELECT DOC_RCV_ID , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP STT WHERE DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID ) ), DOC_RCV_URL AS ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , DOC_RCV_ID , URL , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , EXPIRE_DT FROM ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , DOC_RCV_ID , URL , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , EXPIRE_DT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY DOC_RCV_ID ORDER BY ISSUE_DT DESC) AS RN FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL@DL_MCP ) WHERE RN = 1 ), DOC_RCV_URL_OTP AS ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , SEQ , OTP , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , FAIL_CNT , LAST_AUTH_DT FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL_OTP@DL_MCP OTP WHERE SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL_OTP@DL_MCP WHERE RCV_URL_ID = OTP.RCV_URL_ID ) ) SELECT RCV.DOC_RCV_ID , RCV.RES_NO , RCV.TARGET_SEQ , RCV.REQUEST_DAY , TO_CHAR(RCV.REQUEST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DT , RCV.WORK_TMPL_ID , RCV.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID , COALESCE(SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME, MCRC.CSTMR_NAME) AS CSTMR_NAME , RCV.MOBILE_NO , RCV.SCAN_ID , TMPL.WORK_ID , ( SELECT WORK_NM FROM EMV_SCAN_WORK@DL_MCP WHERE WORK_ID = TMPL.WORK_ID) AS WORK_NM , TMPL.WORK_TMPL_NM , STT.RCV_YN , DECODE(STT.RCV_YN, 'Y', '접수', '미접수') AS RCV_YN_NM , TO_CHAR(STT.RCV_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RCV_DT , STT.PROC_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0081', STT.PROC_STATUS) AS PROC_STATUS_NM , TO_CHAR(STT.PROC_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS PROC_DT , URL.RCV_URL_ID , URL.URL , URL.STATUS AS URL_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0082', URL.STATUS) AS URL_STATUS_NM , TO_CHAR(URL.ISSUE_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS URL_ISSUE_DT , TO_CHAR(URL.EXPIRE_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS URL_EXPIRE_DT , OTP.SEQ , OTP.OTP , OTP.STATUS AS OTP_STATUS , TO_CHAR(OTP.ISSUE_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS OTP_ISSUE_DT , OTP.FAIL_CNT , TO_CHAR(OTP.LAST_AUTH_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS LAST_AUTH_DT FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV@DL_MCP RCV , NMCP_WORK_TMPL@DL_MCP TMPL , DOC_RCV_STATUS STT , DOC_RCV_URL URL , DOC_RCV_URL_OTP OTP , MSP_REQUEST MR , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MCR , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MCRC WHERE RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND RCV.WORK_TMPL_ID = TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID AND RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID AND RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = URL.DOC_RCV_ID AND URL.RCV_URL_ID = OTP.RCV_URL_ID AND RCV.RES_NO = MCR.RES_NO (+) AND MCR.REQUEST_KEY = MCRC.REQUEST_KEY (+) AND RCV.RES_NO = MR.RES_NO (+) AND MR.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM (+)

/* DocRcvMapper.getDocRcvItemList */ SELECT DRI.ITEM_SEQ AS itemSeq , DRI.DOC_RCV_ID AS docRcvId , DRI.ITEM_ID AS itemId , DRI.STATUS AS status , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0084', DRI.STATUS) AS fileStatusNm , TO_CHAR(DRI.RCV_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS fileRcvDt , ITEM.ITEM_NM AS itemNm , ITEM.REQUEST_YN AS requestYn , CASE WHEN DRI.STATUS = 'E' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE ITEM_SEQ = DRI.ITEM_SEQ AND RESULT_CODE != '0000' ) ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP ESF , NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM_FILE@DL_MCP FI WHERE ESF.SCAN_ID = DR.SCAN_ID AND ESF.FILE_ID = FI.FILE_ID AND FI.ITEM_SEQ = DRI.ITEM_SEQ AND FI.RESULT_CODE = '0000' ) END AS fileCnt FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV@DL_MCP DR , NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM@DL_MCP DRI , NMCP_WORK_ITEM@DL_MCP ITEM WHERE DR.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND DR.DOC_RCV_ID = DRI.DOC_RCV_ID AND DRI.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_ID ORDER BY (CASE WHEN REQUEST_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END), ITEM.ITEM_NM

/* DocRcvMapper.getDocRcvUrlLastIssued */ SELECT RCV_URL_ID AS rcvUrlId , DOC_RCV_ID AS docRcvId , URL , STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0082', STATUS) AS urlStatusNm , ISSUE_DT AS issueDt , EXPIRE_DT AS expireDt FROM ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , DOC_RCV_ID , URL , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , EXPIRE_DT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY DOC_RCV_ID ORDER BY ISSUE_DT DESC) AS RN FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL@DL_MCP ) WHERE RN = 1 AND DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId}
mapper.update: /* DocRcvMapper.insertDocRcvStatusRetry */ INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP ( DOC_RCV_ID , DOC_SEQ , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , STT.DOC_SEQ + 1 , STT.RCV_YN , STT.RCV_DT , 'R' , SYSDATE , #{userId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP STT WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID )
mapper.select: /* DocRcvMapper.getDocRcvUrlOtp */ SELECT RCV_URL_ID AS rcvUrlId , SEQ , OTP , STATUS , ISSUE_DT AS issueDt , FAIL_CNT AS failCnt , LAST_AUTH_DT AS lastAuthDt FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL_OTP@DL_MCP OTP WHERE RCV_URL_ID = #{rcvUrlId} AND SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL_OTP@DL_MCP WHERE RCV_URL_ID = OTP.RCV_URL_ID )
mapper.insert: /* DocRcvMapper.insertDocRcvStatusProc */ INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP ( DOC_RCV_ID , DOC_SEQ , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , NVL(STT.DOC_SEQ, 0) + 1 , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , #{procStatus} , SYSDATE , #{userId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP STT WHERE STT.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND STT.DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS@DL_MCP WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID )
mapper.select: /* DocRcvMapper.getItemFileCompletedList */ SELECT F.ITEM_SEQ AS itemSeq , F.FILE_ID AS fileId FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV@DL_MCP RCV , NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM@DL_MCP I , NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM_FILE@DL_MCP F , EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP ESF WHERE RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = I.DOC_RCV_ID AND I.ITEM_SEQ = F.ITEM_SEQ AND I.STATUS = 'C' AND RCV.SCAN_ID = ESF.SCAN_ID AND F.FILE_ID = ESF.FILE_ID

/* DocRcvMapper.getItemFileListByItemSeqs */ SELECT ITEM_SEQ AS itemSeq , FILE_ID AS fileId , MERGE_YN AS mergeYn FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE ITEM_SEQ IN
#{itemSeq}

SELECT ITEM_ID , ITEM_SEQ AS itemSeqFrom , MIN(ITEM_SEQ) OVER (PARTITION BY ITEM_ID) AS itemSeqTo FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM@DL_MCP WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND STATUS = 'P' AND ITEM_ID IN ( SELECT ITEM_ID FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM@DL_MCP WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND STATUS = 'P' GROUP BY ITEM_ID HAVING COUNT(ITEM_ID) > 1 ) ORDER BY ITEM_ID, ITEM_SEQ

/* DocRcvMapper.getDocRcvItemFileListByItemId */ SELECT FI.ITEM_SEQ , FI.FILE_ID , TO_CHAR(FI.CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CRET_DT , FI.EXT , FI.RESULT_CODE , FI.RESULT_MESSAGE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM@DL_MCP IT , NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM_FILE@DL_MCP FI WHERE IT.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND IT.ITEM_ID = #{itemId} AND IT.ITEM_SEQ = FI.ITEM_SEQ
